title: Congratulations, your agenda is ready !
someActions: Here are few simple actions to get you started using your agenda
addProfileImage: Add a profile image to your agenda
sendLink: Send the link of your agenda to your contributors !
copyLinkAndSend: Copy and paste the link below and send it via email or post it on social networks.
embedYourAgenda: Embed your agenda into your website
needPrivate: You want a private agenda? Only the members that you will invite will be able to see its contents.
